title: Warehouse 14
content: The Industrial Zone is a skeleton of a city. Warehouse 14 looks like a massive, rusted ribcage. The only sound is the metal roof groaning in the wind.||You slide the heavy door open just enough to slip inside. The air is thick with the smell of old grease and the metallic tang of fear. It's too quiet.||You know Julian Sterling was hiding here. You need to find exactly where.

choices.text: Enter the main hall and search for the hideout.
